mnemonics.title: ER Components
mnemonics.content: ERAK: Entities, Relationships, Attributes, Keys - four pillars of ER modeling

mnemonics.title: Relationship Types
mnemonics.content: UBT: Unary (1 entity), Binary (2 entities), Ternary (3 entities)

visualTips.visualization: Double rectangle → Think of a baby (weak) holding parent's hand (identifying relationship)
Double oval → Imagine multiple bubbles coming from single attribute

analogies.analogy: Like nouns (entities) connected by verbs (relationships) in a sentence
